name: @ngelik/brain-hands
description: TypeScript CLI for orchestrating Codex brain/hands workflows.

scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run validate-release
scripts.test:static-contract: vitest run tests/core/schema.test.ts tests/core/execution-spec.test.ts tests/core/testing-funnel.test.ts tests/prompts/renderer.test.ts tests/workflow/replan.test.ts
scripts.test:cross-cutting: vitest run tests/workflow/runtime-local.test.ts tests/workflow/runtime-github.test.ts tests/workflow/preflight.test.ts tests/workflow/status.test.ts tests/core/ledger.test.ts tests/core/discovery-ledger.test.ts tests/core/run-configuration.test.ts tests/core/controller-provenance.test.ts tests/verification/runner.test.ts
scripts.release:e2e: npm run build && npm run test:release:no-build
scripts.test:planner-replay: vitest run tests/core/execution-spec.test.ts tests/workflow/plan-repair.test.ts tests/workflow/planner.test.ts tests/progress/events.test.ts tests/scripts/brain-hands-wrapper.test.ts
